logo.description: SPACE [green O circle] TECHNOLOGIES stacked text. Dark uppercase 'SPACE' with green (#2ECC71) circle containing 'O', 'TECHNOLOGIES' in smaller dark uppercase below. No badge background — sits directly on image. Always top-right corner.

alternativeLogo.usage: Occasionally for product/ecommerce articles (~14% of images). Used as SECOND logo in addition to top-right placement.
alternativeLogo.badgeShape: white semi-circle/arc clipping at bottom-right corner

headline.stacking: 1-2 words per line for maximum impact — creates tall, narrow headline block

leftText.backgroundOverlay: soft gradient fade white to mint (#FFFFFF to #F0F8F5), barely perceptible

rightVisual.transitionStyle: soft gradient fade from left zone, no hard edge

layout.headlineStacking: 1-2 words per line for impact — creates narrow, tall text blocks

typeA-guide.trigger: AI/ML guides, development articles, telemedicine topics
typeA-guide.headline: left 25-30%, stacked 1-2 words/line
typeA-guide.visual: professional at workstation right 70-75%, detailed dashboard/UI on screen
typeA-guide.overlays: optional — floating UI mockup cards overlaid near screen; optional small illustrated icons in lower-left (healthcare only)
typeA-guide.person: doctor in white coat (healthcare) or developer/professional (tech), facing LEFT
typeA-guide.screenContent: complex multi-panel dashboards, AI visualizations, patient data, code editors

typeB-topCompanies.headline: left 28-30%
typeB-topCompanies.visual: group photo of professionals in meeting/office right 70-72%
typeB-topCompanies.person: group of 4-5 professionals in bright modern meeting room, mixed genders, smiling
typeB-topCompanies.screenContent: laptops visible showing charts/graphs (part of scene, not overlay)

typeC-productShowcase.headline: left 25-28%
typeC-productShowcase.visual: person at laptop right; floating product cards + chatbot/AI conversation windows in center overlapping both zones
typeC-productShowcase.overlays: product card (white, with image/price/rating/buttons) + AI chat window (white rounded card with blue border, user/bot messages)
typeC-productShowcase.screenContent: shown via floating overlay cards, not directly on laptop screen
typeC-productShowcase.backgroundNote: soft mint/teal gradient more pronounced on left

typeD-mobileApp.trigger: symptom checkers, mobile apps, phone-based interfaces
typeD-mobileApp.headline: left 28-30%
typeD-mobileApp.visual: person holding smartphone right with app UI visible on screen
typeD-mobileApp.overlays: holographic/translucent floating UI elements above device — semi-transparent panels with body scans, risk indicators (red/orange/green), chat bubbles, security icons
typeD-mobileApp.person: holding smartphone, may face RIGHT (exception to normal left-facing rule) to show phone screen
typeD-mobileApp.screenContent: app UI on phone: symptom list, urgency level, confidence %, recommendation, action buttons

logoPlacement.primaryStyle: direct placement on image, no badge background

alternativePosition.style: white semi-circle/arc badge clipping at corner
alternativePosition.usage: occasional, for product/tool articles (~14%), used as SECOND logo alongside top-right

visualStyle.imageStyle: realistic photography of professionals at workstations with detailed screen content and optional floating UI overlays

photographyComposition.subject: professional person(s) at workstation with laptop/monitor showing topic-relevant UI
photographyComposition.faceDirection: facing LEFT toward text zone (~71%); Type D mobile may face RIGHT (~29%)
photographyComposition.expression: neutral, focused, professional; smiling in group photos
photographyComposition.posture: seated at desk (Types A, B, C), holding device (Type D)
photographyComposition.environment: clean, bright, modern workspace with natural light
photographyComposition.genderDistribution: ~57% male individual, ~29% female individual, ~14% mixed groups

screenContent.importance: PRIMARY visual element — detailed, realistic, topic-relevant UI on screens
screenContent.healthcare: complex multi-panel medical dashboards: brain neural network viz, patient vitals (BP, temp), video calls with patients, X-rays, EHR data, urgency indicators, clinical notes
screenContent.ai-ml: AI dashboards, MLOps tools, neural network visualizations, data run tables, model performance charts
screenContent.consulting: charts, graphs, presentations visible on laptops (part of scene)
screenContent.ecommerce: shown via floating overlay cards (product cards, chat windows), not directly on screen
screenContent.mobile: app UI on phone screen: symptom checkers, urgency levels, recommendations

categorySpecific.healthcare: doctor in white coat at desk with medical dashboard on monitor; video calls with patients; clinical notes overlay
categorySpecific.ai-ml: developer at laptop with AI dashboards, MLOps tools, neural network visualizations on screen
categorySpecific.consulting: group of professionals in bright meeting room with glass windows, laptops with charts
categorySpecific.ecommerce: person at laptop; product interfaces and chatbot windows as floating overlays
categorySpecific.mobile: person holding smartphone with app UI visible on screen, holographic floating elements

overlayElements.description: Floating UI overlays are a distinctive SOA visual storytelling element. Present in ~57% of images. They convey the article topic by showing actual product interfaces.

appScreenshots.placement: overlaid on or near the screen in photo, slightly angled or straight
appScreenshots.style: white/dark cards with realistic UI content, subtle drop shadow

clinicalNotes.placement: overlaid on laptop screen or floating beside it
clinicalNotes.style: white card with structured sections: Symptoms, Assessment, Plan — clean medical documentation format

chatWindows.placement: center of canvas, overlapping text-photo boundary
chatWindows.style: rounded white card with 'AI Assistant' header, light blue (#3498DB) top border accent, user avatar + message, bot icon + response

productCards.placement: floating above or beside the laptop/monitor
productCards.style: white card with product image, name, price, star rating, feature tags, action buttons (Add to Cart, Buy It Now)

holographicUI.style: semi-transparent panels (~60-70% opacity) with body scan silhouette, color-coded risk indicators (red HIGH, orange MODERATE, green LOW), chat bubbles, lock/security icon

circularBrandIcons.placement: floating above laptop with hand-drawn arrow pointing to them
circularBrandIcons.style: circular badge (50-60px) with tool logo, connected by thin hand-drawn curved dark blue/black arrow

handDrawnArrows.style: thin curved dark blue/black stroke, casual hand-drawn feel
handDrawnArrows.usage: connecting text area to floating tool/brand icon

smallIllustratedIcons.style: thin outlined line drawings, 2px stroke, dark outlines with green (#2ECC71) accent fills/highlights
smallIllustratedIcons.content: medical/health themed: cross, chat bubble, heart, phone, person icon
smallIllustratedIcons.usage: ONLY in healthcare/telemedicine Type A layouts (~14% of images)

backgroundGradient.style: very soft white-to-mint (#FFFFFF to #F0F8F5), barely perceptible
backgroundGradient.intensity: more pronounced in Type C product showcase images

visualStyle.backgroundTexture: soft white-to-mint gradient in text zone, realistic office photography in visual zone, no hard edge between zones
visualStyle.iconStyle: product screenshots and UI previews as primary visual elements; thin outlined icons as secondary accents (healthcare only)

ai.screenContent: AI dashboards, MLOps tools, neural network visualizations, data runs
ai.overlays: optional circular tool icon with hand-drawn arrow

telemedicine.screenContent: medical dashboards, patient vitals, video calls, X-rays, EHR data
telemedicine.overlays: clinical notes card, small illustrated medical icons in lower-left

ecommerce.screenContent: shown via floating overlay cards (not on screen)
ecommerce.overlays: product card + AI chat window overlapping both zones

mobile.screenContent: app UI on phone screen: symptom list, urgency, recommendations

default.overlays: optional floating UI cards near screen
